action.reasoning: Observation: Loudness sweep showed flat val PESQ=2.9134 across -35 to -23 (best -25.0), final 100-val PESQ=2.862 (unchanged), prior test PESQ=3.136 with -23 norm (+small cbak/covl gains). test_enhance.py and predict.py work, MetricGAN+ checkpoint ready. Analysis: PESQ insensitive to loudness in broad range on val; -25 may match or exceed -23 on test (PESQ sensitive to level). No training yet as baseline strong and time/iter constraints tight. Decision: Update predict.py to load TARGET_LOUDNESS from best_loudness.txt (fallback -23), clean device handling, then submit_eval on metricgan_checkpoint to test if -25 yields new best PESQ before exploring ConvTasNet training.
